title: pavonia cristata
intro: Pavonia cristata, also known as Rock Rose or Mountain Rose, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Malvaceae family and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Pavonia cristata is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and salves to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
